_comment: Metadata for traversing the CC-BY-SA 4.0 SRD 5.1 HTML produced by Tabyltop. The app fetches this file first, then uses it to fetch and parse the SRD. Update selectors/patterns here if the source file ever changes; the HTML never needs to change for structural updates.
attribution: SRD 5.1 © Wizards of the Coast LLC, licensed CC-BY-4.0. HTML conversion by Tabyltop (https://www.tabyltop.com).

weapons._comment: The weapons section starts at the element with heading_id. The first <table> sibling contains the column headers and initial category label. The second <table> sibling contains all weapon rows; single-cell rows are category dividers.

monsters._comment:
Individual monsters are

elements after the element with section_id. A monster h4 is identified by its next non-empty

sibling containing an child whose text matches type_line_re. Walk subsequent siblings up to lookahead_limit collecting fields via field_patterns and the ability-score (identified by stat_table_first_header in the first cell of its first row). Stop the block when an

not in action_headings is encountered, or any

/

/

.
